name: CERO THERAPEUTICS HOLDINGS, INC.
summary: CERo Therapeutics Holdings, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing chimeric engulfment receptor (CER) T-cell therapies for cancer. Its lead product candidate, CER-1236, is being developed as a cell therapy. The company completed a business combination with Phoenix Biotech Acquisition Corp. (PBAX) in February 2024 and is advancing CER-1236 through preclinical studies and clinical trials targeting oncology indications.
